description_short: Ledgerock Systems is a Columbus, OH accounting software vendor that has sold general-ledger and AP products to mid-market distributors and manufacturers since 1998.
description_long:
Ledgerock Systems sells accounting software to mid-market distributors and manufacturers: a multi-entity general ledger, AP automation, and financial reporting. More than 4,200 companies run their books on it.

The company has operated since 1998 — twenty-five years of accounting depth, quarterly releases, and a five-year public roadmap. It is privately held and headquartered in Columbus, OH, with offices in Chicago and Atlanta. Its age and posture mark it as an established vendor, not a venture-scale startup.
not_startup_reason: Long-established (since 1998) software vendor, not a startup.
